data.body:
Guadalupe Pineda’s “Arias de Ópera.” 2002. 
Perhaps the only Latin American singer to venture into the difficult world of singing Arias. She sings Arias by Saint Saens, Puccini, Bizet, Haendel, Verdi, Mozart, etc. 
She is constantly training her wonderful voice to surprise us. R U listening Madonna?

data.body: I’d only push back in cases of clear self defense.
